arts.ttl: Rashford gets start for Villa against Club Brugge as he returns to Champions League
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford will resume his Champions League career Tuesday in Aston Villa’s starting lineup against Club Brugge. According to UEFA statistics, Rashford played 33 Champions League games for United, scoring 12 goals.

arts.ttl: “It is difficult to find a ceiling for him” – David Villa on Barcelona sensation Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has been a standout performer at Barcelona since he established himself in the first team at the start of last season. During this period, he has dazzled supporters and pundits alike, and former players are equally as amazed. One of those is David Villa, who is counted among Barcelona’s best forwards of the […] The post “It is difficult to find a ceiling for him” – David Villa on Barcelona sensation Lamine Yamal appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Club Brugge confirmed as Rashford and Asensio calls made
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has named his starting XI for the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Club Brugge at the Jan Breydel Stadium. Villa starting XI: Martinez, Disasi, Konsa, Mings, Digne, Tielemans, McGinn, Bailey, Rogers, Rashford, Watkins.

arts.ttl: £370m Aston Villa boost as Chris Heck speaks out
arts.sum: It has been reported that Chris Heck hopes Aston Villa's revenue will reach up to £370m for this season Those earnings includes gate receipts and income from UEFA's newly created value pillar on top of the £42m which the club will be awarded in prize money.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs. Aston Villa team news: Starting lineups confirmed for Champions League last-16 fixture
arts.sum: Club Brugge and Aston Villa announce their starting lineups for the first leg of their Champions League last-16 fixture on Tuesday night.

arts.sum: Aston Villa will get their Champions League last-16 campaign under way on Tuesday evening as they take on Club Brugge in their first leg in...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have work to do to convince player – Monchi call in January may not be enough
arts.sum: Aston Villa may need to work hard if they want to sign goalkeeper Álvaro Valles in the summer transfer window, with insistence that he’s going to return to Real Betis. Estadio Deportivo cover the player today as he prepares for the summer as a free agent after leaving Las Palmas on February 10th. arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs Aston Villa LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups ahead of last-16 clash
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s men impressed during the league phase and must now fight past the Belgian side

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford feelings made clear as Bruges bar footage shows Aston Villa takeover
arts.sum: Aston Villa are taking over in Bruges this week, ahead of the Champions League last 16 first leg clash with Club Brugge in Belgium this evening (KO 17:45). Aston Villa take on Club Brugge in the Champions League and Manchester United loanee Marcus Rashford is in line to feature
